summary:
Claim: Dr. Bernhard Giesenhagen is most strongly associated with the bone ring technique.  
Evidence: - Historical German surgical texts document the bone ring technique as standard in maxillofacial trauma procedures during his era. - Regional surgical traditions emphasize biomechanical stability via rigid fixation, matching the technique’s application.  
Answer: <A>
